idea: Build a social network for hamsters to share photos and connect with other hamsters online
description: A mobile app and web platform where hamster owners can create profiles for their pets, upload photos, and let hamsters virtually meet other hamsters. The app will have AI-powered hamster recognition, a marketplace for hamster toys, and hamster-to-hamster video calls. We plan to monetize through premium hamster profiles, ad placements from pet food brands, and VIP hamster dating features.
